response.justification: The role requires modern C++ or Rust as a primary skill, and the candidate has neither in any substantive or recent form — only ~6 months of C/C++ work at National Instruments over a decade ago (2014-2015) and a student-era C++ project. Recent experience is concentrated in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. While the candidate has relevant geospatial/GIS exposure through GISCollective and Green Map, there is no evidence of navigation/routing systems, tiling pipelines, or production distributed-systems work in the required language stack.
strengths: Genuine geospatial/GIS background via GISCollective and Green Map
Low-latency, high-throughput service experience at Sociomantic (DLang, millions of req/s)
Strong testing/craftsmanship orientation (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, open-source tooling)
concerns: No meaningful modern C++ experience; last C/C++ role was ~6 months in 2014-2015
No navigation systems, routing, or map-tiling pipeline experience
